creator: petef@databits.net
text:
[cc'd to maintainer for approval]

What would you think of this patch?  The proper place to look for
ipfw-al is ${PREFIX}, because ipfw-al is installed with this port.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/cvs/ports/net/ipfw-graph/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 Makefile
--- Makefile	2001/11/17 19:12:19	1.1
+++ Makefile	2001/11/21 18:12:17
@@ -17,4 +17,8 @@
 
 MAN8=		ipfw-al.8 ipfw-graph.8
 
+post-patch:
+	@${PERL} -pi -e 's,/usr/local,${PREFIX},g' ${WRKSRC}/ipfw-core.c \
+		${WRKSRC}/ipfw-data.c
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>


-pete

--
Pete Fritchman [petef@(databits.net|freebsd.org|csh.rit.edu)]
finger petef@databits.net for PGP key
